incident_note: P-G6 production walk blocked before journey matrix. erp.holistikaresearch.com serves legacy v1 accordion UI (copyright 2025) without Production badge or /sign-in route. Vercel production deploy 3787f06 READY on *.vercel.app with magic-link sign-in — custom domain not attached to hlk-erp Vercel project (get_project domains[] lacks erp.holistikaresearch.com). 0/8 journey PNGs; honest FAIL — no subagent visual sign-off.

captures.observations: erp.holistikaresearch.com/research-center shows legacy v1 accordion (Documentation / POI-GOI / Facts). No POV switcher, no Production badge, no insight rail. Copyright 2025 footer — stale host.
erp.holistikaresearch.com/sign-in?next=%2Fresearch-center returns Next.js 404. Magic-link entry path from charter is broken on mandated production hostname.

hlk-erp-git-main-holistika.vercel.app/sign-in shows Mission Control magic-link form (Google/Microsoft + work email). Copyright 2026 — matches 3787f06 production deploy. Not charter host; supplementary evidence only.

blockers: DOMAIN-DRIFT: custom domain not on Vercel hlk-erp project
BLOCKED-AUTH: magic-link requires operator email click on correct host after domain fix
